text:
うわ、大きい！
お刺身なら何百人分にもなりそうね。

臭みもないし、これならたぶん癖もなく
さっぱりいただけるんじゃないかしら？

レシピはあらかじめいろいろ考えて
おいたし、まずは持って帰って
早めにさばいてみるわ。

また忙しくなりそう！　無理なお願いを
聞いてくれて

Wow! Look at the size of that thing!
I could serve up enough sashimi for a couple
hundred people with this.

It doesn't seem like it has that bad sort of
fishy taste either, so it might appease even
the pickiest of eaters.

I've got lots of dishes I want to try this in,
so I better get back and get chopping.

Time to get busy! Thanks for handling yet
another one of my crazy requests for me.
